creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


The substitution of lpd/lpr/lpc has only a a subset of needed features. 

I am in favor of removeing the option CUPS_OVERWRITE_BASE at all. 

The only solution I see is to run libexec/cups/daemon/cups-lpd, 
and set up a matching printcap. 

Pathes or other ideas welcome.
